title: potentilla varia
intro: Potentilla varia, also known as the Five-finger or Old-field Cinquefoil, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Potentilla varia include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
